prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约36774→44054→52280→56421→77554，连续5年后移，累计后移约40780名；2025年较2024年骤降约21133名，降幅显著，主要受专业组结构调整影响（新增不限选科组拉低整体位次）；本省物理类计划2021–2024年均为25人，2024年增至27人，2025年扩至35人；2026年计划38人，较2025年再扩招约8.6%，扩招趋势持续，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第115名，近年排名稳定在113–115区间，属中游211层次；抖音热度总排名第59位，评价"较热"，短视频曝光量中等偏上；声誉文件及投档异常记录中均未出现该校负面信号，舆情平稳；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校，据公开信息该校林业工程为A+、风景园林学为B+等，与招生专业中的林学类、风景园林等直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等该校物理类招生专业社会热度持续高热推荐；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争略加剧，2025年物理类本科批436分，近年波动不大；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距广东较远，跨省就读需适应气候与生活习惯差异，对部分广东考生存在地域偏好阻力；该校在本省（黑龙江）招生占比约62%，在广东招生占比约1.9%，属非主力生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅下滑后的回调预期、2026年扩招约8.6%的缓解效应、物理类考生小幅增加及热门工科专业持续高热等因素，考虑2025年断档后的自然回升动力，小幅前移修正；预测最低位次约81043名，区间80543–81543名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 36774 → 44054 → 52280 → 56421 → 77554, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 40780 places; in 2025, compared to 2024, it dropped sharply by about 21133 places, a significant decline mainly due to adjustments in the major group structure (the addition of a group with no subject restrictions lowered the overall ranking); the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 25 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 27 in 2024, and expanded to 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 38 students, an increase of about 8.6% compared to 2025, with a continuous expansion trend, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 115th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 113–115 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level; Douyin popularity total ranking 59th, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium to high short video exposure; no negative signals from the university in reputation files or abnormal admission records, with stable public opinion; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data did not include this university, but according to public information, its forestry engineering is A+, landscape architecture is B+, etc., directly related to enrollment majors such as forestry and landscape architecture, offering some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information, and electrical majors in the university's Physics Category enrollment are consistently highly recommended due to social heat; in 2026, Guangdong Province has about 456,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 436 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guangdong, requiring adaptation to climate and lifestyle differences for cross-province study, posing some regional preference resistance for Guangdong candidates; the university enrolls about 62% of students in its own province (Heilongjiang) and about 1.9% in Guangdong, making it a non-primary source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the significant ranking drop in 2025, the easing effect of an 8.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates, and the sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors, along with the natural recovery momentum after the 2025 gap, a slight forward adjustment is made; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 81043, with a range of 80543 to 81543.

If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 popular engineering majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 80000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical, and Computer.
